member.name: T:FileId
member.summary: The ID for a file on Hedera.

member.name: T:FileId_2
member.summary: The public node address book for the current network.

member.name: T:FileId_3
member.summary: The current fee schedule for the network.

member.name: T:FileId_4
member.summary: The current exchange rate of HBAR to USD.

member.name: M:FileId.#ctor(System.Int64)
member.summary: Assign the num portion of the file id.
member.param:
the num portion not negative
Constructor that uses shard, realm and num should be used instead as shard and realm should not assume 0 value

member.name: M:FileId.#ctor(System.Int64,System.Int64,System.Int64)
member.summary: Assign the file id.

member.name: M:FileId.#ctor(System.Int64,System.Int64,System.Int64,System.String)
member.summary: Assign the file id and optional checksum.

member.name: M:FileId.GetAddressBookFileIdFor(System.Int64,System.Int64)
member.summary: Get the `FileId` of the Hedera address book for the given realm and shard.

member.name: M:FileId.GetFeeScheduleFileIdFor(System.Int64,System.Int64)
member.summary: Get the `FileId` of the Hedera fee schedule for the given realm and shard.

member.name: M:FileId.GetExchangeRatesFileIdFor(System.Int64,System.Int64)
member.summary: Get the `FileId` of the Hedera exchange rates for the given realm and shard.

member.name: M:FileId.FromString(System.String)
member.summary: Assign the file id from a string.
member.param: the string representation of a file id

member.name: M:FileId.FromBytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Assign the file id from a byte array.
member.param: the byte array representation of a file id
member.exception: when there is an issue with the protobuf

member.name: M:FileId.FromProtobuf(Proto.FileID)
member.summary: Create a file id object from a protobuf.

member.name: M:FileId.FromSolidityAddress(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieve the file id from a solidity address.
member.remarks: @deprecatedThis method is deprecated. Use {@link #fromEvmAddress(long, long, String)} instead.

member.name: M:FileId.FromEvmAddress(System.Int64,System.Int64,System.String)
member.summary: Constructs a FileId from shard, realm, and EVM address. The EVM address must be a "long zero address" (first 12 bytes are zero).
member.param: the EVM address as a hex string
member.exception: if the EVM address is not a valid long zero address

member.name: P:FileId.Shard
member.summary: The shard number

member.name: P:FileId.Realm
member.summary: The realm number

member.name: P:FileId.Num
member.summary: The id number

member.name: P:FileId.Checksum
member.summary: Extract the checksum.

member.name: M:FileId.ToBytes
member.summary: Create the byte array.

member.name: M:FileId.ToEvmAddress
member.summary: Converts this FileId to an EVM address string. Creates a solidity address using shard=0, realm=0, and the file number.
member.returns: the EVM address as a hex string

member.name: M:FileId.ToSolidityAddress
member.summary: Extract the solidity address.
member.returns: the solidity address as a string

member.name: M:FileId.ToStringWithChecksum(Client)
member.summary: Convert the client to a string representation with a checksum.

member.name: M:FileId.Validate(Client)
member.exception: if entity ID is formatted poorly

member.name: M:FileId.ValidateChecksum(Client)
member.summary: Validate that the client is configured correctly.
member.exception: if entity ID is formatted poorly
